title: 闪烁标语汉化包
body:
# 闪烁标语汉化包

![overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/975e68ec9135b422e6a11dc8c6cd3e49e071b597.png)

此资源包汉化了闪烁标语。闪烁标语基于1.21.11创建。因此1.21.11之后加入的标语不会显示

---
---

# Splash Localization Package 

![overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/975e68ec9135b422e6a11dc8c6cd3e49e071b597.png)

This resource pack has localized the flashing banners. The flashing banners were created based on version 1.21.11. Therefore, banners added after version 1.21.11 will not be displayed.
